title: ClawArena-Team: Benchmarking Subagent Orchestration and Dynamic Workflows in Language-Model Agents
summary: ClawArena-Team: Benchmarking Subagent Orchestration and Dynamic Workflows in Language-Model Agents
whyItMatters: Production large language-model (LLM) agents are increasingly deployed not as lone problem-solvers but as managers: a main model creates specialized subagents, delegates work, and orchestrates their parallel, asynchronous returns through dynamic workflows. Whether one model can actually run such a team is largely unmeasured: existing benchmarks score a poli…
